notes: Solid, complete Asteroids implementation with UFO, wave progression, particles, audio, and proper asteroid splitting — minor issue with fireTimer being decremented twice per frame (once in ship block, once after) but doesn't break gameplay significantly.

Excellent and highly complete Asteroids clone with authentic vector-style graphics, sound effects, and UFO logic, though minor state-transition bugs cause projectiles to freeze temporarily when the player dies or a wave ends.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone, but strict scoring is warranted because of small logic flaws like double fire-timer decrement, no asteroid-vs-ship-shot immunity handling nuances, and some noncanonical UFO/bullet behavior.
